column7: Typo – The word "chuses" is archaic and is considered a non-standard or obsolete spelling of the modern verb "chooses."
Typo – This is probably a safe Global Correction for standard Transliteration.

Typo – Please note the inclusion of "-rī" here is misleading, because the feminine word "kuṭhārī" does NOT mean "a tree". And frankly, I do not see the point in what remains above: "kuṭhāraḥ + .-raḥ " !  It just seems to be excessively irrelevant!  "kuṭhāraḥ" is finished! what need is there of " + .-raḥ" ?
